calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Daniel Ray Bacon, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Ralph Geissler, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Roberto Heckscher.
Default was entered against defendant on December 23, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 7, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ralph Geissler, and against the Defaulted Defendant Roberto Heckscher as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,897,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $142,312.50.
Punitive Damages - $1,897,500.00.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $3,937,737.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Continued To May-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Continued To Apr-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Daniel Ray Bacon, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Ralph Geissler, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony by Plaintiff and considering of counsel arguments, matter is put over to April 8, 2010 @9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218 for plaintiff to provides more evidence and explanation in details of the requested judgment.
Counsel to dismiss all Doe Defendants and causes of actions (accept 3rd cause of action).
